testcase.name: test_07_old_password_still_works_after_change_supabase_bug

failure.message: AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: old password 'master123' still returns 200 after change-password. Response: {"access_token":"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJiYzIzMjczNi0zOTZiLTQ3ZDUtOWQzYi00MWJlOTFiMzViNjgiLCJyb2xlIjoibWFzdGVyIiwib3JnIjoiOWEyMzJiZjItZmMwMS00MjUzLTgxM2YtOGRmMzU2YmUzMWMxIiwiZXhwIjoxNzgzMDkyNDg3fQ.1DNiThHEDlBW9RC64AA9yBXiMwDDT0uhDfDJ60h4QjA","token_type":"bearer","user":{"id":"bc232736-396b-47d5-9d3b-41be91b35b68","email":"master@maintrix.com","nome":"Master MAINTRIX","role. Root cause: server.py:141 tries supabase_client.auth.sign_in_with_password first; server.py:278 only updates MongoDB password_hash; therefore Supabase Auth continues to accept the original password. Fix: after change-password, call supabase_client.auth.admin.update_user_by_id(user['supabase_id'], {'password': new_password}). assert 200 == 401 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration60_change_password.py:268: in test_07_old_password_still_works_after_change_supabase_bug assert r.status_code == 401, ( E AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: old password 'master123' still returns 200 after change-password. Response: {"access_token":"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJiYzIzMjczNi0zOTZiLTQ3ZDUtOWQzYi00MWJlOTFiMzViNjgiLCJyb2xlIjoibWFzdGVyIiwib3JnIjoiOWEyMzJiZjItZmMwMS00MjUzLTgxM2YtOGRmMzU2YmUzMWMxIiwiZXhwIjoxNzgzMDkyNDg3fQ.1DNiThHEDlBW9RC64AA9yBXiMwDDT0uhDfDJ60h4QjA","token_type":"bearer","user":{"id":"bc232736-396b-47d5-9d3b-41be91b35b68","email":"master@maintrix.com","nome":"Master MAINTRIX","role. Root cause: server.py:141 tries supabase_client.auth.sign_in_with_password first; server.py:278 only updates MongoDB password_hash; therefore Supabase Auth continues to accept the original password. Fix: after change-password, call supabase_client.auth.admin.update_user_by_id(user['supabase_id'], {'password': new_password}). E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
